news.headline: Prosafe SE extends Safe Zephyrus contract with Petrobras until Sept 2027 with an increase in fuel allowance to 25m3/day. Total value USD 109.7 million. CEO Terje Askvig notes vessel's success in supporting Petrobras.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Prosafe announced a contract extension with Petrobras to provide the Safe Zephyrus semi-submersible vessel for offshore safety and maintenance support in Brazil. The original 650-day firm period ending in February 2025 has been prolonged by 954 days, now running until September 2027. The fuel allowance has also been raised from 20m3 to 25m3 per day for this extension. The contract extension amounts to around USD 109.7 million. Terje Askvig, CEO of Prosafe, highlighted the vessel's strong performance in supporting safety and maintenance for Petrobras in the Buzios business unit offshore Brazil. This extension reflects the growing demand in the region for high-spec units, positioning Prosafe to expand its market share. For more details, contact: [contact information not provided].

news.headline: Karolinska Development's AnaCardio raises SEK 205 million, positive Phase 1b data of AC01, moving to Phase 2a in Q1 2025.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Karolinska Development AB disclosed that its portfolio firm, AnaCardio, has successfully raised SEK 205 million in a series A extension funding round. Additionally, positive outcomes were revealed from the initial segment of a Phase 1b/2a trial of AC01 in individuals suffering from heart failure and reduced ejection fraction. The remaining part of the study (phase 2a) is anticipated to commence in the initial quarter of 2025.

news.headline: UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: Public spending will be in line with what was set out in the budget.
UK Chief Secretary to the Treasury Jones: We have set tough new fiscal rules that are non negotiable
Solana set for growth with rise of US ETF and retail interest; expected to surpass Bitcoin and Ether by 2025.
news.summary: In 2025, Solana is poised to surpass Bitcoin and Ethereum, fueled by a projected US-based spot SOL ETF and upbeat retail profit forecasts. This could signify a significant shift, highlighting Solana's potential to outperform the two leading cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: UK Treasury Minister Jones: Only the OBR forecast can predict the impact of gilt moves on fiscal headroom.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: The government does not comment on specific market movements.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: UK financial markets continue to function in an orderly way.
UK Treasury Minister Jones: It is normal for the price of gilts to vary.
Banks borrow £51.4bln in BoE short-term repo operation.
Costco sees strong December sales with a 9.9% rise to $27.52B in net sales; expects a 7% jump in January core sales.
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp reported a strong 9.9% increase in net sales to $27.52 billion for the five weeks ending Jan. 5, compared to $25.03 billion last year. Analysts at Telsey Advisory Group predict a 7% year-on-year jump in January 2025 core sales for Costco. They also anticipate a 5% increase in January comparable sales, and a 7% increase in core merchandise sales. TAG projects a 6.5% increase in U.S. sales, excluding forex and gas price changes. The analysts expect Costco to perform well in the coming months despite the uncertain operating environment.

news.headline: UK economy concerns hit retailers, leading to falling investor confidence. #Retailnews
Netcompany has made transactions related to its share buyback program. No specific numbers mentioned.
Objectway enters MENA region, secures first client: Kuwait Financial Centre "Markaz". Expanding business prospects.
news.summary: Objectway, a leading company in asset management, has recently made its debut in the MENA region by acquiring its initial client, the Kuwait Financial Centre “Markaz”. Markaz is a well-known investment firm operating in the Middle East and North Africa. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for Objectway as it expands its presence in the region and demonstrates its growth strategy. This move marks Objectway's first step into the MENA market, reflecting a strategic decision in line with the company's vision for expansion.

news.headline: Grünenthal appoints Prof. Dr. Uli Brödl as CSO, with over 15 years of industry experience, effective 01 February 2025.
news.summary: In AACHEN, Germany, on January 9, 2025, pharmaceutical company Grünenthal revealed that Prof. Dr. Uli Brödl will be taking on the position of Chief Scientific Officer (CSO) and Member of the Corporate Executive Board starting from February 1, 2025. With over 15 years of industry expertise, Dr. Brödl will be bringing his wealth of experience to his new role.

news.headline: Majority of Bitcoin holdings in the US surpass offshore entities by 65%, per CryptoQuant.
86% of consumers opt in for SMS marketing, seeking instant, tailored communication. - Jan. 9, 2025. EZ Texting report.
news.summary: The popularity of SMS Marketing has reached new heights, with a staggering 86% of consumers choosing to participate and showing a strong demand for immediate, personalized messaging. This data comes from EZ Texting, a top text marketing service provider for businesses, based on their recent 2025 Consumer Texting report. The findings highlight the growing trend of customers preferring SMS communication, underscoring the importance of businesses adapting to meet these preferences for effective marketing strategies in today's market.

news.headline: Cyrus Biotech chooses CYR212 as clinical candidate for chronic autoimmune diseases like Myasthenia Gravis.
news.summary: Seattle-based Cyrus Biotech revealed that CYR212, their protease, has been chosen as the clinical candidate for the treatment of chronic autoimmune diseases caused by IgG antibodies.

news.headline: Coinbase alerts users of CFTC subpoena linked to Polymarket, may send account data in response to the request.
news.summary: Coinbase may potentially have to disclose specific user account details to the CFTC as per a subpoena linked to Polymarket.

news.headline: Acer's 2024 revenues reach NT$264.71 billion, up 9.7% with non-PC businesses contributing 28.3%. Q4 revenues at NT$66.12 billion, up 4.7% YoY.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Acer Inc. reported preliminary consolidated revenues reaching NT$66.12 billion, reflecting a 4.7% year-on-year increase. This marks the company's sixth consecutive quarter of year-on-year growth. For the entire fiscal year 2024, Acer's preliminary consolidated revenues totaled NT$264.71 billion, up by 9.7% compared to the previous year.

news.headline: US Govt sells 69,370 seized Bitcoins from Silk Road, worth $6.5 billion after getting DOJ approval.
news.summary: The US government has been authorized to sell around 69,370 Bitcoins seized from Silk Road, a darknet website, with an estimated value of $6.5 billion. This decision was approved by a federal judge due to the cryptocurrency's price instability, as reported on Wednesday. The Department of Justice pushed for the sale of these assets, however, they have not confirmed this information in response to media inquiries.

news.headline: Pound drops as UK yields rise, signaling presence of bond vigilantes.
Circus SE unveils 2025 strategy focused on Physical AI leadership in food-service industry. Order backlog exceeds 8,600 units.
news.summary: In Hamburg, Germany, Circus SE (XETRA: CA1), known for its Physical AI applications in the food-service sector, has announced its 2025 strategy. The company aims to further advance the use of Physical AI to spearhead the evolution of AI applications and promote autonomy in labor-heavy sectors. Following a successful 2024, during which Circus initiated mass production of its autonomous CA-1 robot and received orders for over 8,600 units, the company is set to transform manual-intensive industries.

O2 Czech Republic partners with Allot Ltd to provide cybersecurity through Allot DNS Secure for consumer customers.
news.summary: In Hod Hasharon, Israel, on January 09, 2025, Allot Ltd. shared news that O2 Czech Republic, a subsidiary of the PPF Group, has rolled out Allot DNS Secure. This move by Allot Ltd. (NASDAQ: ALLT) (TASE: ALLT), a key player in global network intelligence and converged network-native security solutions, allows O2 Czech Republic to improve cybersecurity offerings for their mobile and fixed broadband consumer customers. With this launch, O2 Czech Republic aims to provide enhanced protection services to its customer base.

news.headline: TikTok faces potential ban in the U.S. on Jan. 19, impacting billions in ad revenue. Creators and brands rush to adapt.
news.summary: TikTok, a popular social media platform, serves as a conduit for billions of dollars in advertising revenue. This platform is facing a potential ban in the United States by January 19. In response to this looming threat, brands and content creators are hurrying to make necessary arrangements and adjustments to their marketing strategies.

news.headline: Supreme Court to decide on TikTok case, balancing national security and free speech. Arguments on Friday in challenge to ban law.
news.summary: On Friday, the court will listen to arguments regarding a law that prohibits the app, which has resulted in conflicting rulings in the past when balancing these two interests.

French 20 Yr 2.5% OAT Auction
Stax LLC appoints Peter Rodrigues-Renon as Director of EMEA Value Creation Practice, focusing on commercial due diligence for private equity firms.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in New York City, a renowned global strategy consulting firm called Stax LLC shared exciting news via PRNewswire. Stax LLC focuses on commercial due diligence, value creation, and exit planning for various financial entities such as private equity firms, PE-backed companies, hedge funds, and investment banks. The firm happily declared the selection of Peter to a notable position within their organization.

news.headline: French 10 Yr 3% OAT Auction
Private equity firm Lion Equity Partners acquires Global Compression Services from Warren Equipment Company, leading distributor of parts/components for natural gas engines. #Denver #Acquisition
news.summary: A private equity firm based in Denver, Lion Equity Partners, specialized in corporate carve-outs, completed the acquisition of Global Compression Services (GCS) from Warren Equipment Company located in Midland, Texas. GCS, a prominent distributor globally, deals with OEM and aftermarket parts for reciprocating natural gas engines and compressors. The company also manufactures unique components.

news.headline: Verne appoints Michele Tagliatti as CFO, with 10+ years experience in data centers. Will drive financial strategy.
news.summary: Verne, a prominent provider of sustainably powered HPC data centers in the Nordics, has named Michele Tagliatti as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Tagliatti, who has amassed more than a decade of experience in the data center, telecommunications, and technology industries, is set to leverage his expertise in his new role. By devising a results-oriented financial strategy, Tagliatti aims to play a crucial role in Verne's growth trajectory. This move underscores the company's commitment to strategic financial planning as it expands its operations.

news.summary: The technology sector is resisting upcoming regulations that are anticipated to ensure advanced technology remains within the United States and its allies.

DAMAC CEO in process of securing funding for US data center deal, details to be finalized.

news.summary: The proposal, which faced strong opposition from banks, was ultimately defeated with the help of lobbying efforts. Following this development, a key regulator revealed plans to relinquish his leadership position this week.

TCL CSOT debuts advanced smart cockpit display solutions at CES 2025, showcasing innovations in automotive display tech.
news.summary: At the CES 2025 event in Las Vegas on January 9, TCL CSOT, a prominent player in display technology, will present its state-of-the-art automotive display solutions. The exhibit will highlight pioneering advancements in smart cockpit technology. Within their automotive display zone, TCL CSOT will showcase three innovative solutions, emphasizing their commitment to pushing the boundaries of display technology in the automotive sector.

news.headline: LLCP to invest in Zero100, a community organization, with Founders & existing management. - Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, Levine Leichtman Capital Partners (LLCP), a worldwide private equity firm, revealed their decision to provide a growth investment in Zero100 Community Limited (Zero100). This investment is being made in collaboration with the Company's Founders and current stakeholders.

news.headline: Vantage Foundation partners with Grab Indonesia on Wiramudi Grab program to empower women, announced on Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, on January 9, 2025, Vantage Foundation revealed its collaboration with Grab Indonesia on December 19, 2024. The partnership aims to endorse the Wiramudi Grab initiative, which focuses on boosting women's empowerment by providing opportunities to earn income through flexible working hours.

news.headline: 2024 ez1095 software from Halfpricesoft.com allows processing of ACA forms, including unlimited 1095 & 1094 forms for one flat rate. Developers have just updated the software with the latest IRS E File schema.
news.summary: A company in Redmond, Washington, has announced that they are offering unlimited printing of Paper, PDF, and E-file options for 1095 & 1094 forms for a flat rate. The software has been IRS approved since 2015, and their latest update in January 2025 includes the newest IRS E-File schema. This update allows clients to conveniently file their forms using the updated software.
